error_signature: Workflow did not finish, possible out-of-memory issue
title: Out-of-memory issue with n8n runners enabled
symptom: n8n gradually consumes all server RAM, leading to workflows not finishing. The server memory clears after hitting the limit, causing a cycle of memory consumption.
root_cause: Enabling the N8N_RUNNERS feature can lead to excessive memory usage if the runners are not managed properly. This can cause the application to consume all available RAM, resulting in out-of-memory errors during workflow execution.
fix_steps: Open the Docker Compose file for n8n
Restart the n8n service to apply changes
agent_instruction: Disable the n8n runners by removing the N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED setting and restart the service.
